mapper.select: SELECT id, course_id, material_name, file_url, file_type, file_size, download_count, is_downloadable, sort_order FROM osh_course_material WHERE course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO osh_course_material ( course_id, section_id, material_name, file_url, file_type, file_size, is_pay_only, sort, create_by, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{courseId}, #{sectionId}, #{materialName}, #{fileUrl}, #{fileType}, #{fileSize}, #{isPayOnly}, #{sort}, #{createBy}, NOW(), NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE osh_course_material SET download_count = download_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
